users.title: Users
users.description: Manage site accounts, administrator access, account status, and session revocation. This page focuses on account workflows instead of raw debug fields.
users.inviteUserDescription: Send a registration invitation to an email address. Existing pending invitations for that address will be replaced.
users.invitationsDescription: Review user invitations, copy registration links, or revoke invitations that are still pending.
users.confirmRevokeInvitation: Revoke the pending invitation for {{email}}? The existing link will stop working.
users.noInvitationsDescription: No user invitations have been created yet.
users.detailDescription: Manage account details, security actions, and the Minecraft profiles and textures that will belong to this account.
users.detailPageDescription: View and manage one account. Profiles, skins, and external authentication details will expand from here.
users.detailNotFoundDescription: This user does not exist, or you do not have permission to view it.
users.emptyDescription: After setup, accounts will appear here.
users.filteredEmptyDescription: Try a different keyword, role, or status.
users.createDescription: Create a local account and assign role/status immediately.
users.passwordCreateHint: 8-128 characters. Leave blank to generate a temporary password.
users.passwordCreatePlaceholder: Leave blank to generate a temporary password
users.generatedPasswordDialogDescription: {{username}} has been created. Copy the temporary password now; it cannot be shown again after this window closes.
users.generatedPasswordDescription: Copy it now and share it through a secure channel. The plaintext password is not stored or shown again.
users.forcePasswordChange: Require password change at next sign-in
users.createForcePasswordChangeDescription: When enabled, the user can only enter the password-change flow on first sign-in. If the password is generated, the backend forces this on.
users.forcePasswordChangeDescription: When enabled, the user's current and future restricted sessions can only access password change, profile, and logout endpoints.
users.forcePasswordChangeDisabled: Password change is not required at next sign-in.
users.accountSectionDescription: Update this account's sign-in identity, administrator access, and status.
users.securitySectionDescription: Reset the sign-in password or revoke current sessions immediately.
users.minecraftSectionDescription: Profiles, skins, capes, and authentication details will live here. The page structure is ready so this does not grow back into a dialog.
users.noMinecraftProfiles: This user has no Minecraft profiles.
users.revokeSessionsDescription: The user will need to sign in again. This does not delete the account or Minecraft profiles.
